title: PlayPack 7
description: A fast, smooth tech/exploration modpack for 1.20 featuring Create, Mekanism, and Thermal Series mods.
body:
**This pack is still under development - this is a Beta build!**

A fast, smooth tech/exploration modpack for 1.20 featuring Create, Mekanism, and Thermal Series mods. 

Also featuring:
- A full suite of optimisation mods.
- World generation by Terralith.
- Assorted animals and creatures.
- A collection of farming and Vanilla+ mods.
- Some magic spells from Iron's Spells, as a treat.

This pack is primarily intended as an internal pack for the DMPTR Minecraft server. You can use it for other purposes, but I may release updates that break your game.
